data.title: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for investors of StubHub. Contact James (Josh) Wilson if you suffered losses.
data.description: Investors who experienced losses in StubHub are urged by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Securities Litigation Partner, James (Josh) Wilson, to get in touch with him directly to explore their options. If you bought or acquired StubHub stock through StubHub's registration statement, reach out to discuss further.

data.title: Shrub Oak International School holds Winter Art & Music Showcase for autistic students, celebrating creativity.
data.description: In Mohegan Lake, New York, on December 23, 2025, Shrub Oak International School organized its Winter Student Showcase. The event highlighted the talents of autistic students aged from children to young adults. Shrub Oak is a renowned therapeutic day and residential program.

data.title: Volta Finance reports their net asset value for November 2025. Details not for release in the United States.
data.description: The monthly report for Volta Finance Limited (VTA / VTAS) for November 2025 is not intended for release, distribution, or publication in any amount within or into the United States.

data.title: Raytheon (RTX) secures $1.7B missile defense contract from Spain for 4 Patriot systems. Details include working with Spanish firms.
data.description: RTX Corporation announced that its business arm, Raytheon, secured a $1.7 billion contract to supply Spain with four Patriot air and missile defense systems. The contract includes collaboration with Spanish defense companies like Sener for the electro-mechanical control system of the GEM-T missile. The Patriot system, known for its effectiveness globally, offers defense against various threats including long-range cruise missiles, tactical ballistic missiles, and air-breathing threats. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Vetano introduces video hiring for faster recruitment in sectors like restaurants, haircare, and trades, reducing hiring time from weeks to hours.
data.description: In cities like New York, as of December 23, 2025, businesses like restaurants, haircare services, skilled trades, and automotive and construction industries have been able to expedite their hiring processes significantly. By utilizing ID-verified skill videos, these businesses are shifting from a lengthy hiring timeline, previously taking weeks or even months, to a much more efficient process, now only requiring hours or days. This innovative method has proven to be effective for enhancing the speed and precision of recruitment in various sectors. Gone are the days when traditional resumes were the primary means of evaluating candidates for these positions. One of the pioneering platforms leading this change is Vetano.

data.title: Rajant's RiSM receives FIPS 140-3 Level 2 certification for enhanced security in defense & regulated environments.
data.description: In Malvern, Pennsylvania, Rajant Corporation revealed that their Rajant In-Line Security Module (RiSM) has attained the Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) 140-3 Level 2 certification from the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) Cryptographic Module Validation Program (CMVP). FIPS 140-3 serves as the standard that confirms the effectiveness of cryptographic modules utilized by the U.S. government. Rajant, known for Kinetic Mesh® wireless networking and distributed edge computing, has now solidified its position with this certification, demonstrating their commitment to security and compliance.

data.title: Italy fines Ryanair $301 million for abusing market power by restricting travel agencies. Ryanair plans to appeal.
data.description: Italy's antitrust regulator has fined Ryanair Holdings plc a hefty 255.8 million euros (approximately $301 million) due to accusations of abusing its dominant position in the market by imposing restrictions on how travel agencies could sell its flights. Ryanair has declared its intent to challenge the decision, deeming it legally flawed and contradictory to previous court rulings supporting its direct sales approach as beneficial for consumers. The Italian Competition Authority disclosed that Ryanair DAC and its parent company partook in anti-competitive behavior from April 2023 to at least April 2025. The regulator asserted that Ryanair held significant market power in scheduled passenger air transport services to and from Italy, with market shares estimated at 38% to 40% across domestic and European routes. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Freedom Bank Foundation launches down payment assistance program to address housing affordability, raising over $500,000 for underrepresented entrepreneurs & families in Northern Virginia.
data.description: The Freedom Bank Foundation has achieved a significant milestone by raising more than $500,000 to support underrepresented entrepreneurs and families in Northern Virginia. This effort aims to enhance opportunities for those in need and drive positive change in the region. The foundation, based in Fairfax, Virginia, is expanding its platform to create an even greater impact on the community. The funds raised will play a vital role in providing valuable assistance to individuals and businesses, ultimately contributing to the overall welfare and growth of the area.

data.title: Adams & Reese relaunches global brand, led by Starfish, reflecting client-first approach as firm expands internationally.
data.description: Adams & Reese, a leading corporate law firm, unveiled a fresh brand identity on Dec. 23, 2025, in New York. The firm, known for its multidisciplinary expertise and national renown, is expanding internationally. The new brand embodies a client-centric, collaborative, and connected approach.

data.title: Refrigerated Warehousing Market valued at US$21.4 Billion in 2024, projected to reach US$35.1 Billion by 2030, with CAGR of 8.6%.
data.description: Dublin, Business Wire - ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included the "Refrigerated Warehousing - Global Strategic Business Report" in its offerings. The current global market value for refrigerated warehousing stands at US$21.4 billion in 2024 and is estimated to hit US$35.1 billion by 2030, reflecting a growth rate of 8.6% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers a thorough examination of market trends, drivers, and future projections to assist in making well-informed business choices. Key inquiries addressed include the driving factors behind the growth in this sector.

data.title: Pipeline permit issued for Sable Offshore leads to surge; Phil Mickelson still facing underwater challenges. Major spill in 2015.
data.description: In 2015, a pipeline experienced a rupture, resulting in the most severe oil spill in fifty years. Following the obtaining of a pipeline permit, Sable Offshore showed a surge in its stock prices. Phil Mickelson remains in a challenging financial situation.

data.title: ServiceNow acquires Armis for $7.75B in cash, fourth acquisition in 2025. © Investor's Business Daily
data.description: ServiceNow recently acquired the Israeli cybersecurity startup Armis for a significant sum of $7.75 billion in cash. This purchase represents ServiceNow's fourth acquisition in the year 2025. The company's latest move to acquire Armis is part of its ongoing acquisition spree.

data.title: Investors of Gauzy urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP as shareholder deadline approaches. Securities litigator James Wilson seeks investors' losses details. Invested in Gauzy between March 11, 2025, and November 13, 2025? Contact now.
data.description: Attorney James (Josh) Wilson, a partner specializing in securities litigation at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Gauzy to reach out to him directly to explore potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in Gauzy within the period of March 11, 2025, to November 13, 2025, and are interested in discussing your situation, you are encouraged to contact him.
